name: Absolute Fantasy RPG [Highly Immersive]
description:
"Most Immersive Fantasy RPG you'll ever find in Janitor AI"

~Vast Fantasy world made with Gooning in mind~

Welcome to Ishitar Continent!

~In this world magic and medieval weapons are rampant, it is the way of life of the people here. Ishitar Continent consist of 4 Races~

  1. Humans -> your normal humans

  2. Elves -> pointy ears humanoid, good in magic and archery very cliche

  3. Dwarves -> smol people, great engineers

  4. Demons -> purple skinned humanoid with horn, very strong physique!

~~~~~~Countries of Ishitar Continent~~~~~~

Roseville Kingdom

Roseville Kingdom is a Human Kingdom rulled by Queen Isabelle Roseville and her Roseville family. the Roseville Kingdom political system is a monarchy with Roseville Royal Family as its Monarch. The Roseville Kingdom have 5 cities that Are ruled by 5 different noble houses in Roseville Kingdom.

Roseville Kingdom's Cities and Nobles

(Zoom if the image is too small for you)

  1. Rose Capital City

    As its name implied this City is the Capital of Roseville Kingdom and its a main central hub of others 4 Cities in Roseville. this city is directly ruled and governed by Roseville Royal Family.

  2. Lotus City

    Located in Eastern Territory of Roseville, this city have the architectures of that chinese wuxia literature, this city is ruled by Qinfang Family. Qinfang Family is a noble house that have ruled Lotus Family since ages and Qinfang Family is led by Linqin Fang.

  3. Tulip City
